title: Da Ponte Online — A Digital Scholarly Edition (Web Application)
description: The published web-app form of the Da Ponte digital scholarly edition of late-17th–18th-century Italian libretti: reading views with facing facsimiles, a three-way intertextual comparator for Il Talismano, a character relationship network, and client-side full-text search. This deposit archives the rendered, static, re-hostable site (HTML/JS/CSS + IIIF facsimiles + Pagefind index). Live site: https://daponte.ficlit.unibo.it

creators.name: Pacchin, Marta
creators.affiliation: Conservatorio di Castelfranco Veneto · Conservatorio di Trapani
